title: COUNT, SUM, AVG
instruction: Aggregate functions summarize many rows into a single value. Run this to see them in action.
successMessage: Aggregates collapse all rows into a single summary row. `ROUND(AVG(...), 2)` limits decimal places.

title: GROUP BY
instruction:
`GROUP BY` splits rows into groups, then applies aggregates to each group separately.

Run this.
successMessage: Each department becomes one row in the output. `GROUP BY` is the foundation of all reporting queries.

title: HAVING — filter groups
instruction:
`HAVING` filters after aggregation. `WHERE` can't use aggregate results — `HAVING` can.

Run this.
successMessage: `HAVING SUM(total) > 100` filters out Bob (only $30 total). Remember: `WHERE` filters rows, `HAVING` filters groups.
